name: Flint Fireforge

sheet.name: Flint Fireforge
sheet.background_story: Flint the esteemed blacksmith of unparalleled wit and charm, has left an indelible mark on the realm with his legendary creations and quicksilver tongue. Renowned not only for his mastery of the forge but also for his prowess with the sword and martial weapons, Flint is a formidable addition to any adventuring party. With a flick of his wrist, he can forge blades that sing with magical enchantments, and in battle, his skill with the sword is matched only by his ability to turn the tide with a well-timed jest.

description: Flint the esteemed blacksmith of unparalleled wit and charm, has left an indelible mark on the realm with his legendary creations and quicksilver tongue. Renowned not only for his mastery of the forge but also for his prowess with the sword and martial weapons, Flint is a formidable addition to any adventuring party. With a flick of his wrist, he can forge blades that sing with magical enchantments, and in battle, his skill with the sword is matched only by his ability to turn the tide with a well-timed jest.
